scripts.prisma:generate: env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL npx prisma generate --schema=./schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:push:dev: env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --schema=./schema.prisma
scripts.migrate:dev:reset: env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL npx prisma migrate reset --force --schema=./schema.prisma && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.migrate:dev: env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./schema.prisma && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.migrate:dev:repair: env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL npx prisma migrate diff --from-migrations ./migrations --to-schema-datasource ./schema.prisma --shadow-database-url "$SHADOW_DATABASE_URL"
scripts.build:prod: npm run build && npm run start:prod
scripts.local-dev: npx concurrently "npm run ssl" "npm run dev"
scripts.dev: npm run normalize:deps && npm run prisma:ensure-client && npm run prisma:push:dev && env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL NODE_ENV=development PORT=3000 ./node_modules/.bin/keystone dev
scripts.start: npm run normalize:deps && npm run prisma:ensure-client && NODE_ENV=production PORT=3000 ./node_modules/.bin/keystone start
scripts.build:dev: npm run normalize:deps && npm run prisma:ensure-client && env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL ./node_modules/.bin/keystone build
scripts.build: npm run normalize:deps && npm run prisma:ensure-client && env -u DATABASE_URL -u SHADOW_DATABASE_URL ./node_modules/.bin/keystone build
